characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The Ace: A multitalented musical prodigy. Big Little Sister: She's taller than her older brother Cameron. Black and Nerdy: Given her admission into the ANT farm and musical ability, she's naturally this. The Cast Show Off: She gets to sing at least once per episode. It's evenLampshadedby Lexi in "chANTsof a lifetime".Lexi:I spent $400 on tickets to seeyousing? I see that every day for free! Foolish Sibling, Responsible Sibling: The talented Responsible Sibling to Cameron's Foolish untalentedDumbass Teenage Son.

characters.name: Chyna Parks
characters.description: The Ace: A multitalented musical prodigy. Big Little Sister: She's taller than her older brother Cameron. Black and Nerdy: Given her admission into the ANT farm and musical ability, she's naturally this. The Cast Show Off: She gets to sing at least once per episode. It's evenLampshadedby Lexi in "chANTsof a lifetime".Lexi:I spent $400 on tickets to seeyousing? I see that every day for free! Foolish Sibling, Responsible Sibling: The talented Responsible Sibling to Cameron's Foolish untalentedDumbass Teenage Son.

characters.name: Olive Doyle
characters.description: Awkward Kiss: She gets one from Fletcher at the end ofunwANTed. The Bore: She constantly bores everyone around her by telling “interesting” factoids which aren’t that interesting. Catchphrase:"What the heck?!" and "Interesting factoid" (and, to a degree, "Hollah!").Season 3 introduces "Zazzow!". "What the heck?!" and "Interesting factoid" (and, to a degree, "Hollah!"). Season 3 introduces "Zazzow!".

characters.name: Fletcher Quimby
characters.description: Abusive Parents: Implied in several instances. Book Dumb/The Ditz: He often says and does stupid things. However, this did not prevent him from being in the ANT program. Born Unlucky: He's theButt-Monkey. Plus, his parents don't seem very supportive of his artistic ability. Butt-Monkey: His talent is usually dismissed as useless, everyone sees him as an idiot and a loser, and he spends most of this show being in love with Chyna, who only sees him as a friend. It gets even worse in Season 3, where most people treat him like he's nobody, Olive acts more aggressively toward him, and for some reason, the entire country hates him (In a later episode, that last thing is proven to most likely be falsedue toKennedybeing revealed to not be a debate prodigythis was probably fabricated,and this whole thing about everyone hating him either herbeing sadistic or she's venting her annoyance towardssome of Fletcher's stupid moments.) Deadpan Snarker: He has his moments. He could easily be the snarkiest character on the show but his ditziness keeps him in check.

characters.name: Lexi Reed
characters.description: Alpha Bitch: Lexi's a stereotypically bitchy and narcissistic popular high school girl. She either parodies or exaggerates most traits of anAlpha Bitch. Attention Whore: Toamazinglevels. Lexi would do anything to be in the school paper, even if it means appealing to Olive, despite the fact that she generally dislikes theANTs. Beauty Is Bad: She’s a beautiful girl, but also an egotistical, selfish bully. Best Friend: To Paisley. Big Bad Ensemble: With Principal Skidmore, somewhat.

characters.name: Cameron Parks
characters.description: Butt-Monkey: Shares the role with Fletcher. He's treated like an idiot by everyone, and he often strikes out with girls. Childish Older Sibling: His sister Chyna is only 11 but she's smarter and more mature than he is. Demoted to Extra: He's been replaced by Angus in Season 3. The Ditz: He's not that smart. Still smarter than Paisley though. Dumbass Teenage Son: Chyna's older brother and probably the third dumbest person on the show.

characters.name: Angus Chestnut
characters.description: Abhorrent Admirer: To Olive and is one of the rare male cases of this. Ascended Extra: In season 3, replacing Cameron. Big Eater: He eats a lot, as seen in many episodes. Casanova Wannabe: He fancies himself as aKid-anova, but he's not that successful. Fat Bastard: He's starting to become one of these.

characters.name: Paisley Houndstooth
characters.description: Accidental Misnaming: At Cheerleader tryouts, Paisley mispronounces Chyna and Olives' names, and when they correct her, she assumes the names she mispronounced were entirely different people than Olive and Chyna and allows them to tryout since "Ca-hyna" or "A-live" didn't show. Achievements in Ignorance: Sometimes toReality Warperlevels. She's made a helicopter out of balloonsthat workedand did a full body gift wrapping ofherself! All-Loving Heroine: Paisley is friendly, kind, and generous, she is practically the opposite of Lexi who is mean to just about everyone in the school. She's also very nice to the A.N.T.s, unlike most of the other teens. Beauty Equals Goodness: In contrast withLexi, Paisley is a beautiful girl and one of the nicest characters in the show. Best Friend: To Lexi.

characters.name: Susan Skidmore
characters.description: 0% Approval Rating: All the students hate her. Alliterative Name:SusanSkidmore. Big Bad Ensemble: With Lexi Reed. Well, not anymore, as of Season 3. Dean Bitterman: Fits the role of the mean principal really well. Evil Redhead: She's one of the main antagonists and has red hair.

characters.name: Darryl Parks
characters.description: Big Eater/Fat Idiot: In "TheReplacemANT", he stuffs his face with ice cream and burritos out of boredom from a lack of crime. Bumbling Dad: Like a lot of sitcom dads, he’s dumb and goofy. Butt-Monkey: Mostly around Christmas. Disproportionate Retribution: He locked Cameron out of the house because he broke Chyna's antPad and was having trouble finding the funds to fix it. Hidden Depths: Working on his own, he's actually quite competent. When hired by Skidmore to find her missing phone, he does some solid investigative work to determine she stole her own phone to get a new one for free. While he was wrong he finds the real perpetrator seconds later and Skidmore breaks the phone anyways realizing she wanted a new one.

characters.name: Gibson
characters.description: Catchphrase: "Welcome to the A.N.T. Farm!", sometimes followed up with "I love doing that!". Cloudcuckoolander: He’s probably the quirkiest character on the show, which is saying something. The Ditz: He is one of the less smart people in the series. Expy: OfSpencer Shay. Hammerspace Hair: He keeps, among other things, licorice, fresh tissues and corn cobs in his hair.

characters.name: Wacky The Wolf
characters.description: Berserk Button: Being impersonated. When he caught Lexi doing it, he gave her aNo-Holds-Barred Beatdown. Cloudcuckoolander: As you would expect from someone named Wacky. Delusions of Doghood: In “ignorANTs is bliss”, he enters himself in a dog show and then chases a cat. The Faceless: He’s never seen without his mask. In “fANTasy girl”, Fletcher pulls his mask off and finds that there’snothing under it! Meaningful Name: He’s definitely a wacky guy.

characters.name: Violet
characters.description: Abhorrent Admirer: To Fletcher, who likes Chyna and is intimidated by Violet’s anger issues. Cute Bruiser: She’s a cute little girl, but she’s really strong. Hair-Trigger Temper: She has anger issues. Muscles Are Meaningless: Violet easily takes down Officer Parks in "infANT". Pint-Sized Powerhouse: She’s small, but strong.

characters.name: Zoltan Grundy
characters.description: Cloudcuckoolander: He tries to market phones topetsfor one thing. Andbabies. No, we're serious.Nonetheless, he is a genius in his own right. Nonetheless, he is a genius in his own right. Good Counterpart: To Principal Skidmore. He treats theANTsmuch more nicely than she did. Intergenerational Friendship: He’s a middle-aged man and he’s friends with Lexi, who’s a teenager. Odd Friendship: With Lexi. She’s a beautiful, rude, fashion-obsessed teenage girl while Zoltan is chubby, balding, polite, middle-aged man and tech genius.

characters.name: Hashimoto
characters.description: Arch-Enemy: To Zoltan Grundy and theANTsin season 3. Ascended Extra: Started out as one-shot character inSuite Life On Deck, before becoming a main antagonist inA.N.T. Farm. Bad Boss: Using humans as guinea pigs? Check. Resorting to unpaid child labor? Check. Forcing his employees to sleep in tubes? Double check. Big Bad: Of Season 3. Corrupt Corporate Executive

characters.name: Winter Maddox
characters.description: Flat "What": Does this in every episode. Villain Team-Up:With Hashimoto in "finANTialcrisis". You Look Familiar: She's played by the same actress as Madam Goo Goo.

characters.name: Kennedy Van Buren
characters.description: The Dragon:She eventually proved to be Hashimoto's daughter, although she came to care for most of theANTS. Status Quo Is God: The events of "finANTialcrisis" (in which her true identity is revealed) are essentially ignored in "meANTto be?".
